name: FactPulse Billing
description: B2B invoicing app compliant with Factur-X (EN 16931), connected to the FactPulse platform.

SECRET_KEY.description: Django secret key for cryptographic signing.

SECURE_SSL_REDIRECT.description: Set to false if SSL is handled by the platform.

DJANGO_SUPERUSER_EMAIL.description: Email for the initial admin account.

DJANGO_SUPERUSER_PASSWORD.description: Password for the initial admin account.

worker.command: uv run celery -A config worker -l info --concurrency 2
